title: atylosia scarabaeoides
intro:
Atylosia scarabaeoides, also known as the butterfly pea or the sensitive plant, is a legume native to tropical Asia, recognized by its unique ability to fold its leaves in response to touch or light.

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. These properties make it beneficial for various health issues, including wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
